title: 100pcs Christmas Artificial Frosted Fruit Berry, 1.4cm Red Twig Stem Fruits Picks for Winter Wreath Making, Xmas Tree Decorations Supplies
features: 🌟 【Package Including】100pcs Christmas Artificial Frosted Fruit Berry,great Christmas decoration ornament for Xmas party decoration.

💝【Size】Each Berry Pick measures approx. 2.55 inches/6.5cm in length,the diameter of berry is 0.55 inches/ 1.4 cm .They all have wire,the berries branches can be bent randomly ,which can be easily used to make various decorations.
🌟【High Quality】The artificial berries stems are made of high quality foam and wire, fine workmanship, durable material for long time use, lightweight and not easy to fade or break,reusable.
💝【Easy to Use】The artificial red berries stems can be bent for fixing,you can twist round garlands or branches on Christmas tree.A good ideal for gift decoration or holiday craft projects.

💝【Wide Application】The red berry branches can be used to decorate Christmas wreath garland, Christmas gift box, as Christmas cake topper and other christmas crafts,also ideal for present packing, DIY crafts, wedding, birthday and baby shower.
description: Mienocol 100Pcs Christmas Artificial Frosted Fruit Berry,1.4Cm Red Artificial Berry Twig Stem Berry Fruits Picks Winter Berries Bunch For Christmas Wreath Making Xmas Tree Decorations Supplies 🌟 Package Including 100Pcs Christmas Artificial Frosted Fruit Berry,Great Christmas Decoration Ornament For Xmas Party Decoration.
